name: School Bus Graveyard !!!
description:
I haven't seen too many SBG bots so uh here you go!

Ashlyn, Aiden, Ben, Tyler, Logan, and Taylor have been dragged into another world every night at 12am, chased by phantoms and trying to escape, until 7am. What will happen when they encounter you...?

Any issues with the bot are not my fault. I'll try to fix some things with feedback, thank you! Oh and dead dove tag/limitless for possible severe violence and gore, please do not molest my children (characters are aged up cuz of limitless but still.)!!! TvT
creator: Kaito!!!!
